channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: New Mac for Christmas? Try these 6 apps and games with your new Apple computer
item.description: Did your Christmas morning start off with a Mac under the tree? No matter if you unwrapped a new MacBook, iMac, or Mac mini, that hardware is just the beginning of a gift that will keep on giving. In 2025, there are more apps and games for Apple computers than ever.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: The ‘internet of beings’ is the next fronteir that could change humanity and healthcare
item.description: In the 1966 film Fantastic Voyage, a spacecraft and its crew are shrunk to microscopic size and injected into the body of an injured astronaut to remove a life-threatening blood clot from his brain.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: I'm slashing my streaming bills by 56% in 2026 – here's my five-step masterplan
item.description: Five ways to cut the cost of Netflix, Disney+ and more by selectively subscribing and cutting unnecessary options.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Marshall, TechRadar

item.title: Scammers hit Christmas cheer with fake wine and festive gift emails - here's how to stay safe
item.description: Holiday-themed emails increasingly carry scams using loan forms, fake order confirmations, and credential harvesting to collect sensitive personal and financial information.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Fujifilm's epic 40TB tape cartridge is here - despite what Elon Musk says, the future of offline data storage looks very bright
item.description: Fujifilm’s 40TB LTO-10 tape reinforces offline storage relevance as enterprises balance ransomware risk, regulatory demands, and growing AI driven archival volumes.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: The banality of Jeffery Epstein’s expanding online world
item.description: In recent weeks, a project called Jmail.world has quickly recreated the online life of Jeffrey Epstein, the late financier and convicted sex offender with myriad ties to the rich and powerful.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Heilweil, Fast Company

item.title: From OpenAI to Nvidia, here’s a list of recent multibillion-dollar AI deals
item.description: Nvidia has agreed to license technology from AI startup Groq for use in some of its artificial intelligence chips, marking the chipmaker’s largest deal and underscoring its push to strengthen competitiveness amid surging demand.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: High severity flaw in MongoDB could allow memory leakage
item.description: Document database vendor MongoDB has advised customers to update immediately following the discovery of a flaw that could allow unauthenticated users to read uninitialized heap memory.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DoD expands login options beyond CAC
item.description: The memo does not include any requirements for authenticators to be phishing-resistant, even though DoD is required to retire phishable authenticators by 2027. The post DoD expands login options beyond CAC first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Digitalizar y cooperar para… saber y poder cuidar o curar
item.description: La transformación digital que se está produciendo en el sector salud no sigue un esquema planificado, ni responde a una estrategia explícita planteada por alguno de los múltiples actores que interactúan en nuestro sistema sanitario.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to watch Australia vs England: live stream Boxing Day 4th Ashes Test for *FREE* from anywhere in the world, Australia lead by 46 runs after 20 wickets fall on Day 1
item.description: All the ways to watch the 4th Ashes Test at the MCG, the famous Boxing Day Test, from anywhere as Australia and England battle in cricket’s historic series.
item.dc:creator: Andy Murray, TechRadar

item.title: 5 eye-opening Google Android app tricks from 2025
item.description: We talk about tons of tips for making the most of Android and tapping into all the software’s easily overlooked options, features, and shortcuts. But when it comes to real-world productivity, Google’s actual operating system is really only half the story.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Virtual reality opens doors for older people to build closer connections in real life
item.description: Many retirement developments serve as a tranquil refuge for older people who can no longer travel to faraway places or engage in bold adventures.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: France’s postal service was hit by a major cyberattack right before Christmas. Here are the hackers who did it
item.description: A pro-Russian hacking group claimed responsibility for a major cyberattack that halted package deliveries by France’s national postal service just days before Christmas, prosecutors said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Cameroon vs Gabon Free Streams: How to watch AFCON 2025 Group F opener, TV channels, preview
item.description: We'll show you all the ways you can watch Cameroon vs Gabon in the 2025 AFCON from anywhere in the world.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Shapland, TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft is not rewriting Windows in Rust
item.description: A job posting by a Microsoft engineer sparked excitement about a project “to eliminate every line of C and C++ from Microsoft by 2030”, replacing it with Rust — but alas for fans of the memory-safe programming language, it turns out this is a personal goal, not a corporate one, and Rust isn’t necess
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Apple appears set to begin iPhone 18 (test) production soon
item.description: Something that appears to have started earlier than ever before, Apple is allegedly already test manufacturing of the next model of its basic smartphone, the iPhone 18.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
